notes: All nine responses correctly identified the root cause as a PostgreSQL password mismatch for user 'app'. Accuracy was strong at low temperature: every t0.1/t0.4 response quoted the verbatim message and a correct frame, with the main differentiator being whether the secondary ConnectionError was mentioned. The single serious failure is t0.7|rep2, which fabricates 'psycopg2.errors.InvalidPassword' as the exception class (not in the image) and truncates the message — a true hallucination, not a visible-text discussion. No empty/truncated/repetition-loop failures occurred.
